description: 4-stage deterministic pipeline (OBSERVE → INTERPRET → SYNTHESIZE → VALIDATE) that ingests source documents, meeting transcripts, and study-plan excerpts to produce governed federal spectrum-study working papers. Outputs a WorkingPaperBundle containing Sections 1–7, an FAQ register, a gap register, a validation checklist, results-readiness status, and traceability requirements. Never fabricates quantitative results — Section 6 switches to results-framework mode when results are unavailable.
forbidden_responsibilities: Defining artifact models or envelope schemas — those are owned by shared.artifact_models
Defining identifier schemes — those are owned by shared.ids
Comment resolution logic — that belongs to workflow_modules.comment_resolution
Lifecycle enforcement and governance — that belongs to the control_plane
Storing or querying domain regulatory or allocation data — that belongs to domain_modules
Producing meeting minutes from raw transcripts — that belongs to workflow_modules.meeting_intelligence
Policy recommendations — this module must not produce policy decisions
LLM or embedding-based inference — all logic must remain deterministic heuristics
